proposals.pattern: mv_tier='large' AND sector_red_flags CONTAINS '产能出清/下行周期' AND whale VR spike diverges from quant/technical trend
proposals.proposed_rule: When mv_tier is 'large' and sector red_flags indicate capacity clearing or downcycle, risk-officer must mandate institutional/northbound flow verification. If flow data is missing or negative, default position_sizing to 0% and append veto_flag 'institutional_flow_unverified'. Reject any action != 'sell'/'avoid' that relies solely on retail VR bounces or quant mean-reversion.
proposals.rationale: In this report, whale agent misinterpreted VR=5.65 as accumulation, while risk-officer correctly flagged it as potential wash trading/self-rescue due to missing institutional flow data. Large-cap bounces in sector downcycles are typically distribution traps. This rule hardens the CRO veto line, aligns with V8 (资金解读视角) institutional vs retail distinction, and prevents false buy signals from retail-centric metrics.
